name: sherlock
description: 7 cognitive archetypes for multi-perspective analysis with anti-sycophancy research layer, configurable depth, and shared tool library.
author: Tywin Lu

analyze.description: Run multi-perspective analysis on a problem
examples: @sherlock analyze "Should we migrate from AWS to GCP?"
@sherlock analyze --depth deep --research-depth deep "Audit our security posture"

platform_notes: Install via npx github:tywinlu1988/Baker-Street --platform codex, or manually copy .claude/skills/sherlock/ to ~/.codex/skills/sherlock/
